headline: Will Mondelez (MDLZ) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Mondelez (MDLZ) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

raw.headline: Will Mondelez (MDLZ) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
raw.summary: Mondelez (MDLZ) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Can Mondelez's Innovation Pipeline Reignite Volume Growth?
summary: Mondelez's innovation pipeline spans Biscoff, Ritz, Toblerone and Sour Patch Kids as the snacking giant works to rebuild demand beyond pricing.

raw.headline: Can Mondelez's Innovation Pipeline Reignite Volume Growth?
raw.summary: Mondelez's innovation pipeline spans Biscoff, Ritz, Toblerone and Sour Patch Kids as the snacking giant works to rebuild demand beyond pricing.

headline: From plastic waste to chocolate wrappers: LYB and Mondelez collaborate on Marabou flexible packaging sourced from recycled plastic
summary: Marabou Chocolate Bar Packaging Using LYB CirculenRevive polymers with 100% attributed recycled content via an ISCC PLUS-certified mass balance approach, Mondelez is now able to offer packaging sourced from 75% recycled content for Marabou chocolate bars. Source: Mondelez International. Collaborating across the value chain Solutions like the Marabou chocolate bar packaging depend on collaboration across the value chain to help advance a more circular economy for plastics.
